Operation 'get_/accounts/{accountID}/transfers' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Current description is too minimal. Added details about pagination, what transfer data is returned, and the use case context to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: List all transfers for an account
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all transfers associated with the specified account. Returns transfer objects containing transfer ID, status, amount, source and destination details, and timestamps. Useful for viewing transfer history and monitoring money movement activity.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Added details about pagination, what transfer data is returned, and the use case context to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'get_/accounts/{accountID}/transfers/{transferID}' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description lacks specificity about what details are returned. Enhanced to clarify the complete transfer object structure and typical use cases for retrieving individual transfer details.

data.current_description: Retrieve details of a specific transfer
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific transfer by transfer ID. Returns the complete transfer object including status, amount, source and destination account details, fees, timestamps, and any associated metadata. Use this to check transfer status or retrieve specific transfer information.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about what details are returned. Enhanced to clarify the complete transfer object structure and typical use cases for retrieving individual transfer details.

message: Operation 'post_/accounts/{accountID}/refunds' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too vague. Added clarity on required inputs (transfer ID), optional parameters (amount), what is returned (refund object with ID and status), and important side effect that refunds are asynchronous processes.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new refund for a specified transfer or transaction. Requires the transfer ID and optional refund amount in the request body. Returns the created refund object with refund ID, status, amount, and timestamps. Initiates the refund process, which may take time to complete depending on the source payment method.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague. Added clarity on required inputs (transfer ID), optional parameters (amount), what is returned (refund object with ID and status), and important side effect that refunds are asynchronous processes.

message: Operation 'post_/accounts/{accountID}/cards' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks essential details about inputs, outputs, and card lifecycle. Enhanced to explain what card information is needed, what is returned, and the important side effect that newly issued cards require activation.

data.description_suggestion: Issues a new card for the specified account. Requires card details such as cardholder name and card type in the request body. Returns the created card object with card ID, last four digits, expiration date, status, and activation requirements. The issued card is created in an inactive state and must be activated before use.
data.reasoning: Description lacks essential details about inputs, outputs, and card lifecycle. Enhanced to explain what card information is needed, what is returned, and the important side effect that newly issued cards require activation.

message: Operation 'post_/payment-links' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description provides minimal context. Enhanced to explain the purpose (shareable payment collection), required inputs (amount), what is returned (URL and link details), and the key use case that payment links enable customer-initiated payments.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a shareable payment link for collecting payments. Requires payment amount and optional description in the request body. Returns the payment link object with a unique URL, link ID, amount, status, and expiration settings. The generated link can be shared with customers to initiate payments without requiring direct account access.
data.reasoning: Original description provides minimal context. Enhanced to explain the purpose (shareable payment collection), required inputs (amount), what is returned (URL and link details), and the key use case that payment links enable customer-initiated payments.
